title: CommonSense Genomic I/O
description: Shapes the host can stream into a sandboxed algorithm, plus shared genomic primitives. The host parses raw files (23andMe txt, VCF, BAM, etc.) and hands the algorithm already-typed records — algorithms never touch raw file bytes.

FileKind.title: FileKind
FileKind.description: Parsed input formats the host can produce. Algorithms declare which they accept in `manifest.supportedKinds`.

ReferenceBuild.title: ReferenceBuild
ReferenceBuild.description: Reference assembly the coordinates refer to. Mismatching algorithm and sample silently produce wrong answers — algorithms must reject runs whose `referenceBuild` differs from their own.

Chromosome.title: Chromosome
Chromosome.description: Normalized chromosome label. No `chr` prefix; mitochondrial is `MT`.

Genotype.title: Genotype
Genotype.description: Called genotype, normalized to sorted alleles (`AG`, never `GA`). `-` denotes a missing call on that strand.

Variant.title: Variant
Variant.description: One called variant from the user's sample. The host pre-normalizes; algorithms can rely on the shape.

rsid.description: dbSNP rsID or vendor-specific internal id (e.g. 23andMe `i…`).

position.description: 1-based position on the chromosome under the manifest's declared `referenceBuild`.

ref.description: Reference allele at the locus. Optional for vendor exports that don't carry it.

quality.description: Phred-scaled quality if the source format carried one. Absent for SNP-array exports.

VariantSet.title: VariantSet
VariantSet.description: What the host streams into a Tier-1 algorithm. Variants are lazily yielded — large samples never materialize as one Python list. The host enforces a cap based on `manifest.requirements.memoryMiB`.

sampleId.description: Opaque host-assigned id for the run's sample. Algorithms must treat it as opaque — it never contains user-identifying data.

variants.description: Stream-style variant iterator. The Pyodide shim exposes this as an async generator; this schema captures the materialized shape for validation and fixtures.

SampleStats.title: SampleStats
SampleStats.description: Summary the host already computes during parsing (the desktop app's `Stats`). Algorithms can request this instead of the full variant stream when they only need aggregates.

callRate.description: calledRecords / totalRecords. Surfaced to the user as the QC headline.

Requirement.title: Requirement
Requirement.description: Resource budget the algorithm asks the host to allocate. The host refuses to start a run that would exceed local capacity; the canonical gates record the actual high-water mark and refuse to publish manifests that under-declare.

memoryMiB.description: Peak resident memory inside the sandbox. WASM linear memory ceiling — keep under 3500 MiB unless Memory64 has been confirmed enabled.

wallSeconds.description: Wall-clock deadline. The host enforces via epoch interruption + a watchdog thread.

diskMiB.description: Scratch space under `/output`. Strictly bounded; algorithms cannot grow it at run time.
